name: Tilbury Golf Academy
about: Tilbury Golf Academy is a specialized golf training facility offering advanced simulator technology and professional instruction. The venue features a luxurious private suite with a TrackMan simulator providing access to over 450 global courses, alongside a private teaching and club fitting studio equipped with high-speed cameras and premium brand equipment. It caters to golfers of all abilities through personalized coaching, club fitting services, and simulator usage, with a strong focus on junior development and family-friendly programming. The academy operates with extended winter hours and provides a comprehensive environment for both serious practice and casual play, supported by a PGA-certified professional with extensive teaching credentials.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator with over 450 global courses
PGA-certified professional with specialized coaching expertise
Comprehensive club fitting services with top-tier brand equipment
Luxurious private suite for exclusive events and group play
Family-friendly atmosphere with junior development programs

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator in private suite with over 450 courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the academy also offers club rentals and professional club fitting services with premium brands like Ping, Callaway, Mizuno, Cleveland, Srixon, TaylorMade, and Titleist.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned at the venue, though the private suite includes a TV for entertainment during your session.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator sessions are booked by the hour, allowing flexibility for how many holes you can play within your time slot.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy is highly kid-friendly with junior development programs including PGA Junior League, First Tee of Indiana, TGA Jr. Development classes, and coaching for the Fremont High School Girls golf team.
